relics.name: Burning Blood
relics.agent_hints: Provides passive post-combat healing. Reduces the need to Rest at Campfires, allowing for more Upgrades.

relics.name: Cracked Core
relics.agent_hints: Guarantees 3 passive damage per turn or 8 burst damage if Evoked. Synergizes with early Evoke or Focus cards.

relics.name: Pure Water
relics.agent_hints: Miracle provides 1 temporary Energy and Retains. High synergy with high-cost cards or crucial setup powers on Turn 1.

relics.name: Ring of the Snake
relics.agent_hints: Massively increases Turn 1 consistency. Prioritize innate cards or key powers to draw them immediately.

relics.name: Akabeko
relics.agent_hints: Extremely powerful with multi-hit attacks (e.g., Whirlwind, Pummel) as the +8 applies to EVERY hit of that first attack.

relics.name: Anchor
relics.agent_hints: Mitigates Turn 1 damage, allowing energy to be spent entirely on attacks or setup Powers.

relics.name: Art of War
relics.agent_hints: High synergy with Defect (Orb passive damage) or Poison decks where playing attacks every turn is unnecessary.

relics.name: Bag of Marbles
relics.agent_hints: Multiplies attack damage by 1.5x on Turn 1. Extremely strong with Bag of Preparation or Akabeko.

relics.name: Centennial Puzzle
relics.agent_hints: Synergizes with self-damage cards (e.g., Offering, Hemokinesis) to trigger the draw exactly when needed.

relics.name: Nunchaku
relics.agent_hints: Tracks across turns. High synergy with 0-cost attacks (Shivs, Anger) or infinite loops. Keep track of the counter to plan big turns.

relics.name: Pen Nib
relics.agent_hints: Tracks across turns. Must carefully plan to land the 10th attack on the highest damage card in the deck for maximum value.

relics.name: Smiling Mask
relics.agent_hints: Massively increases the value of hitting Shops early and often to thin out basic Strikes and Defends.

relics.name: Ancient Tea Set
relics.agent_hints: Incentivizes routing through Rest Sites immediately before Elite or Boss combats for a massive Turn 1 advantage.

relics.name: Bag of Preparation
relics.agent_hints: Excellent for finding key setup Powers or mitigating bad Turn 1 hands. Synergizes perfectly with Bag of Marbles or Lantern.

relics.name: Blood Vial
relics.agent_hints: Provides minor but consistent sustain. Also triggers a specific beneficial event in Act 2 (Vampires).

relics.name: Bronze Scales
relics.agent_hints: Highly effective against enemies with multi-hit attacks (e.g., Byrds, Book of Stabbing, Corrupt Heart).

relics.name: Ceramic Fish
relics.agent_hints: Increases the value of card reward screens, shops, and events that add multiple cards to your deck.

relics.name: Damaru
relics.agent_hints: Slowly builds towards Divinity stance. Synergizes with other Mantra-generating cards to reach Divinity faster.

relics.name: Data Disk
relics.agent_hints: Permanent flat buff to all Orb passive and evoke effects. Extremely high priority for Defect.

relics.name: Dream Catcher
relics.agent_hints: Makes resting at Campfires less punishing to your deck's power growth. Good when forced to heal frequently.

relics.name: Happy Flower
relics.agent_hints: Turn counter carries over between combats. AI should track the counter to align the extra energy with high-cost card draws.

relics.name: Juzu Bracelet
relics.agent_hints: Makes '?' rooms entirely safe from regular enemies, greatly increasing the value of event-heavy routing.

relics.name: Lantern
relics.agent_hints: Crucial for playing expensive setup Powers or maximizing burst damage on the very first turn.

relics.name: Maw Bank
relics.agent_hints: Delay visiting shops as long as safely possible to maximize the gold generation.

relics.name: Meal Ticket
relics.agent_hints: Effectively turns Shops into Rest Sites, allowing for much more aggressive pathing.

relics.name: Oddly Smooth Stone
relics.agent_hints: Permanent flat boost to all Block cards. Extremely valuable for surviving long boss fights.

relics.name: Omamori
relics.agent_hints: Allows taking highly profitable Event options (e.g., gain Gold/Relic but obtain a Curse) with absolutely zero penalty.

relics.name: Orichalcum
relics.agent_hints: Do NOT play a basic Defend (5 Block) if you are taking 6 or less damage, as playing the card overrides Orichalcum's 6 Block.

relics.name: Potion Belt
relics.agent_hints: Increases flexibility and allows hoarding of critical potions (e.g., Ghost in a Jar, Fairy in a Bottle) for Boss fights.

relics.name: Preserved Insect
relics.agent_hints: Massively increases the value of Elite pathing. Allows for aggressive Elite hunting to snowball relic acquisition.

relics.name: Red Skull
relics.agent_hints: Massive damage boost. AI should consider intentionally staying slightly below 50% HP to retain this buff if defense is adequate.

relics.name: Regal Pillow
relics.agent_hints: Makes resting highly efficient, rescuing runs with low HP and allowing riskier plays between campfires.

relics.name: Snecko Skull
relics.agent_hints: Extremely powerful with multi-hit poison application (e.g., Bouncing Flask, Envenom) as the +1 applies to every single instance.

relics.name: Strawberry
relics.agent_hints: Immediate flat survivability increase. Also heals for the max HP gained.

relics.name: The Boot
relics.agent_hints: Excellent for pushing damage through Weakness, countering Byrds, or dealing exactly 5 damage to Nemesis during its Intangible turns.

relics.name: Tiny Chest
relics.agent_hints: Tracks across acts. Heavily incentivizes routing through '?' rooms to guarantee free relics.

relics.name: Toy Ornithopter
relics.agent_hints: Turns every potion into a minor healing item. Excellent synergy with White Beast Statue or Alchemize.

relics.name: Vajra
relics.agent_hints: Flat, permanent damage boost. Synergizes well with multi-hit attacks (e.g., Twin Strike, Sword Boomerang).

relics.name: War Paint
relics.agent_hints: Immediate deck power spike. Removes the need to upgrade basic Defends or setup Skills at campfires.

relics.name: Whetstone
relics.agent_hints: Immediate damage spike. Removes the need to upgrade Strikes or basic attacks at campfires.

relics.name: Blue Candle
relics.agent_hints: Allows Curses to be Exhausted for 1 HP. Extremely powerful with Rupture (+Strength on HP loss) or Feel No Pain (+Block on Exhaust).

relics.name: Bottled Flame
relics.agent_hints: Forces a chosen Attack into the opening hand. High priority for core setup attacks or immediate burst damage to eliminate threats on Turn 1.

relics.name: Bottled Lightning
relics.agent_hints: Forces a chosen Skill into the opening hand. Ideal for crucial defensive skills or key draw/setup cards like Apotheosis.

relics.name: Bottled Tornado
relics.agent_hints: Forces a chosen Power into the opening hand. Extremely high value for decks reliant on specific scaling powers (e.g., Demon Form, Echo Form).

relics.name: Darkstone Periapt
relics.agent_hints: Transforms negative events (gaining curses) into permanent survivability scaling. Value increases heavily in event-focused pathing.

relics.name: Gremlin Horn
relics.agent_hints: Massive momentum swing in multi-enemy fights (e.g., Slime Boss, Reptomancer, Gremlin Leader). Prioritize killing minions to fuel further attacks.

relics.name: Horn Cleat
relics.agent_hints: Guarantees 14 Block on Turn 2. The AI should use Turn 2 energy primarily for attacks or powers, relying on this relic for defense.

relics.name: Ink Bottle
relics.agent_hints: Counter carries over between combats. AI must track this carefully at 9 stacks to ensure the 10th card played is optimal for drawing.

relics.name: Kunai
relics.agent_hints: Provides permanent defensive scaling during combat for playing attacks. Requires a deck with cheap/0-cost attacks (e.g., Shivs, Flurry of Blows) to trigger consistently.

relics.name: Letter Opener
relics.agent_hints: Rewards playing multiple skills with free AoE damage. Synergizes exceptionally well with Defect (hologram loops) or Silent (cheap skills).

relics.name: Matryoshka
relics.agent_hints: Increases the value of Treasure Rooms. If obtained early, ensures a massive power spike in later acts.

relics.name: Meat on the Bone
relics.agent_hints: One of the strongest sustain relics. AI can intentionally end combats just below 50% HP to trigger the 12 HP heal, effectively making HP a rechargeable resource.

relics.name: Mercury Hourglass
relics.agent_hints: Consistent free AoE damage every turn. Excellent for stripping Artifact charges or dealing with low-HP minions (e.g., Byrds, Darklings).

relics.name: Mummified Hand
relics.agent_hints: Game-breaking energy generation for Power-heavy decks (especially Defect). AI should play Powers first to discount other high-cost cards in hand.

relics.name: Ornamental Fan
relics.agent_hints: Generates block passively while attacking. Reduces the need to play dedicated Block cards in decks with high attack volume (e.g., Shivs).

relics.name: Pantograph
relics.agent_hints: Provides a massive health buffer specifically for Bosses. Allows the AI to take riskier paths (more Elites/Upgrades) right before the act boss.

relics.name: Pear
relics.agent_hints: Immediate and permanent increase to survivability.

relics.name: Question Card
relics.agent_hints: Increases card reward options from 3 to 4. Significantly boosts the chances of finding core synergy cards. Value is highest when obtained in Act 1.

relics.name: Shuriken
relics.agent_hints: One of the best damage scaling relics in the game. Requires decks that can play 3+ attacks per turn consistently (Shivs, 0-cost attacks).

relics.name: Singing Bowl
relics.agent_hints: Transforms skipped card rewards into permanent Max HP. Extremely synergistic with Question Card or Prayer Wheel.

relics.name: Strike Dummy
relics.agent_hints: Flat damage boost for Strike cards. High synergy with Perfected Strike, Twin Strike, or Pommel Strike.

relics.name: Sundial
relics.agent_hints: Extremely powerful in infinite or highly compressed decks that shuffle frequently.

relics.name: Symbiotic Virus
relics.agent_hints: Dark orbs scale passively over time. Excellent for slow boss fights where the orb can cook.

relics.name: Teardrop Locket
relics.agent_hints: Instantly sets up an energy generation turn by exiting Calm early on Turn 1 or 2.

relics.name: The Courier
relics.agent_hints: Massive economy boost. AI should path heavily through shops to build a powerful deck and relic collection.

relics.name: Toxic Egg
relics.agent_hints: Tremendous long-term value. Defensive cards become immediately potent without campfire upgrades.

relics.name: White Beast Statue
relics.agent_hints: Ensure potion slots are open. Solves difficult elite/boss fights by guaranteeing a constant stream of consumables.

relics.name: Bird-Faced Urn
relics.agent_hints: Powerful healing engine for Defect or any deck running multiple setup powers. Can stall fights against weak enemies to full heal.

relics.name: Calipers
relics.agent_hints: Enables extreme block scaling. Synergizes with Frost Orbs or high-block turns without needing Barricade/Blur.

relics.name: Captain's Wheel
relics.agent_hints: Solves Turn 3 defense natively, allowing energy to be spent purely on offense (crucial against Exploder or Spire Shield).

relics.name: Champion Belt
relics.agent_hints: Turns offensive Vulnerable cards (e.g., Bash, Uppercut) into incredibly strong defensive mitigation tools.

relics.name: Charon's Ashes
relics.agent_hints: Massive AoE scaling for Exhaust-heavy Ironclad decks (e.g., Fiend Fire, Corruption).

relics.name: Cloak Clasp
relics.agent_hints: High synergy with Runic Pyramid or Retain-heavy Watcher decks. Allows for completely passive blocking.

relics.name: Dead Branch
relics.agent_hints: One of the most game-breaking relics. Perfect synergy with Corruption. If generated cards are viable, exhaust everything.

relics.name: Du-Vu Doll
relics.agent_hints: Turns curses from pure detriments into flat scaling. Incredible synergy with Calling Bell or Necronomicon.

relics.name: Emotion Chip
relics.agent_hints: Rewards taking small chip damage to trigger massive Frost or Lightning passive procs.

relics.name: Fossilized Helix
relics.agent_hints: AI should intentionally NOT block small early hits if a massive hit is expected later, saving the buffer for the big hit.

relics.name: Gambling Chip
relics.agent_hints: Perfect consistency for Turn 1. Discard basic attacks/defends to aggressively dig for key setup powers.

relics.name: Ginger
relics.agent_hints: Ensures damage output is never reduced. High value against bosses that constantly apply Weak (e.g., Nemesis, Corrupt Heart).

relics.name: Girya
relics.agent_hints: Permanent +3 Strength if fully utilized. AI should evaluate if the deck has enough sustain to skip healing and lift instead.

relics.name: Golden Eye
relics.agent_hints: Makes Scry cards incredibly deep, allowing near-perfect manipulation of upcoming draws.

relics.name: Ice Cream
relics.agent_hints: Game-breaking utility. AI can fully skip turns defensively to unleash massive X-cost cards (e.g., Whirlwind, Skewer) later.

relics.name: Incense Burner
relics.agent_hints: Counter persists across combats. AI must track the counter to set up Intangible for exact turns when Bosses do massive attacks (e.g., Hyperbeam, Execution).

relics.name: Mango
relics.agent_hints: Massive flat survivability increase. Extremely high value if picked up when at low HP.

relics.name: Old Coin
relics.agent_hints: Instantly provides enough gold for 1~2 powerful relics or card removals at the next shop. Prioritize pathing to a shop after acquiring.

relics.name: Peace Pipe
relics.agent_hints: Enables aggressive deck thinning. AI should prioritize removing basic Strikes/Defends at Campfires if HP is safe.

relics.name: Pocketwatch
relics.agent_hints: Incredible draw engine for high-energy/cost decks. AI must weigh the value of playing a 4th weak card vs drawing 3 extra cards next turn.

relics.name: Prayer Wheel
relics.agent_hints: Doubles card rewards from normal enemies. Massively increases the chance of finding core synergy cards. Pairs perfectly with Singing Bowl.

relics.name: Shovel
relics.agent_hints: Turns Campfires into Relic nodes. AI should prioritize Campfire pathing and avoid resting/upgrading unless absolutely necessary.

relics.name: Stone Calendar
relics.agent_hints: Provides massive AoE on Turn 7. If the AI detects it can survive until Turn 7, it can play purely defensively and let the calendar kill the enemies.

relics.name: Thread and Needle
relics.agent_hints: Passive defense that persists until HP damage is taken. AI should prioritize full-blocking early turns to keep the armor active.

relics.name: Torii
relics.agent_hints: Massively reduces multi-hit damage (e.g., Byrds, Book of Stabbing). AI should calculate exact block to let 5 or less damage through, reducing it to 1.

relics.name: Tough Bandages
relics.agent_hints: Core defensive engine for Discard Silent decks. Turns Calculated Gamble or Dagger Throw into massive block cards.

relics.name: Turnip
relics.agent_hints: Ensures Block output is never reduced. High value against bosses that apply Frail (e.g., Slime Boss, Corrupt Heart).

relics.name: Unceasing Top
relics.agent_hints: Can enable infinite turns with 0-cost cards. AI must prioritize playing all cards in hand to trigger the draw. Anti-synergy with Curses/Statuses.

relics.name: Clockwork Souvenir
relics.agent_hints: Blocks the first enemy debuff OR prevents a self-inflicted debuff from cards like Biased Cognition or Wraith Form.

relics.name: Medical Kit
relics.agent_hints: Allows exhausting Dazed, Wounds, etc. High priority against Status-heavy enemies (Nemesis, Corrupt Heart). Triggers Exhaust synergies.

relics.name: Orange Pellets
relics.agent_hints: One of the strongest items in the game. AI must plan hand sequences to play Attack+Skill+Power in the same turn to clear self-debuffs (e.g., Fasting, Biased Cognition).

relics.name: Strange Spoon
relics.agent_hints: Allows replaying powerful exhaust cards (e.g., Apparition, Catalyst). Do NOT buy if relying on Exhaust to thin the deck for an infinite combo.

relics.name: Busted Crown
relics.agent_hints: Provides Energy but cripples deck building. AI should ONLY pick this if the core deck synergy is already fully assembled and requires no further key cards.

relics.name: Coffee Dripper
relics.agent_hints: Disables healing at Campfires. AI MUST have alternative sustain (Meat on the Bone, Reaper, passive healing) or overwhelming defense before routing with this.

relics.name: Cursed Key
relics.agent_hints: AI must evaluate: Skip chests to avoid curses, or take the curse and route to a Shop/use Omamori to remove it.

relics.name: Ectoplasm
relics.agent_hints: Completely kills shop scaling. AI should drastically lower the priority of Shop nodes in the pathing algorithm after acquiring.

relics.name: Fusion Hammer
relics.agent_hints: Disables upgrading at Campfires. Excellent if AI already has Apotheosis, Toxic Egg, or a fully upgraded core deck. Pairs well with Shovel/Peace Pipe.

relics.name: Philosopher's Stone
relics.agent_hints: Gives enemies +1 Strength. AI must increase the weight of Defensive Modules, especially against multi-hit enemies (e.g., Byrds, Book of Stabbing).

relics.name: Runic Dome
relics.agent_hints: Hides enemy intents. AI must rely entirely on the determinism in its 'Monster DB' (logic_notes) to predict attacks. If a pattern is highly random, AI must over-block.

relics.name: Runic Pyramid
relics.agent_hints: Game-changing relic. AI should HOLD situational cards (board clears, massive blocks) until the exact optimal turn. Anti-synergy with Snecko Eye and Wounds.

relics.name: Snecko Eye
relics.agent_hints: Card costs are randomized (0-3). AI must prioritize drafting high-cost cards (Meteor Strike, Demon Form). AI routing must ignore standard energy curve math.

relics.name: Sozu
relics.agent_hints: Cannot obtain potions. AI must remove potion reliance from boss-fight survival calculations.

relics.name: Velvet Choker
relics.agent_hints: Hard limit of 6 cards per turn. AI MUST disable 'Infinite Combo' evaluations and avoid drafting 0-cost cards (Shivs, Flurry of Blows).

relics.name: Calling Bell
relics.agent_hints: Massive instant power spike at the cost of an unremovable curse. Excellent with Du-Vu Doll or Blue Candle.

relics.name: Enchiridion
relics.agent_hints: Guarantees a free Power on Turn 1. AI should always evaluate playing this Power immediately unless it actively harms the current strategy.

relics.name: Mutagenic Strength
relics.agent_hints: Provides +3 Strength only for Turn 1. AI must heavily bias Max Damage Solvers to use all attacks on Turn 1 to maximize this buff.

relics.name: Necronomicon
relics.agent_hints: Doubles the first 2+ cost attack played each turn. AI must structure its hand sequence to ALWAYS play the heaviest attack first to trigger this effect.

relics.name: Mark of the Bloom
relics.agent_hints: Prevents ALL healing (Campfires, Potions, Relics). AI must shift to a 100% flawless defense strategy, as chip damage is now permanent.
